modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to sign in to Pillar 3 for scheduling changes.

full_description_text: 
Student cannot access Pillar 3 for scheduling.  
New employee also has sign-in issues.  
This affects their ability to manage schedules.  
Need assistance to resolve this problem.
